name: Hearty Halloween Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 Cube Vegetable, Beef or Chicken Bouillon
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, combine the ground turkey, onion, celery, garlic, water, bouillon cube, potatoes, bay leaf, basil, parsley, thyme, tomatoes, and leftover turkey gravy.
2. Bring the mixture to a boil over medium heat.
3. Reduce the heat to low and let the soup simmer for 1 hour, stirring occasionally.
4. Add the vermicelli to the pot and continue cooking until tender, about 15-20 minutes more.
5. Taste and adjust seasoning if needed.
6. Serve hot and enjoy with a side of crusty bread.
More suitable after Thanksgiving than at Halloween.
Serves 6.
